metadata.name: Get Client Approval on Ad Copy

description: A copywriter has finished writing ad copy and needs to get approval from the client before it goes live.

nodes.task_description: Place the ad copy into a shared document.

expected_outcome.value: The copy is in a format that is easy for the client to review.

nodes.task_description: Share the document with the client and request their feedback.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an email to the client with a link to the document.

nodes.task_description: Once feedback is received, make any necessary revisions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the copy based on the client's feedback.
